creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

This PR is confusing. 

First, there is no p5-Crypt-DH-GMP in security/ .  There's 
net/p5-Crypt-DH-GMP and security/p5-Crypt-DH. 

Second, in the repository, net/p5-Crypt-DH-GMP is already at 0.00010: 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/net/p5-Crypt-DH-GMP/Makefile.diff?r1=1.5;r2=1.6;f=h 

Please advise.
